fields.description: Shared secret SAP sends in the X-WMSLite-Key header.
fields.label: SAP API Key

fields.description: On re-send, drop still-Pending coils absent from the new payload (Loaded coils are always protected).
fields.label: Allow Removing Pending Coils on Re-sync

fields.description: Identity = scanned QR equals the coil ID. Regex Extract = pull coil ID from capture group 1.
fields.label: QR Decode Rule

fields.description: Allow loading a coil that is not on the plan (creates an Unplanned coil; supervised).
fields.label: Allow Over-scan (unplanned coils)

fields.description: By Shipment: one loading task per SAP shipment (a truck may show several). By Truck: all shipments for the same truck + delivery date are grouped into one loading task.
fields.label: Loading Task Grouping

fields.description: Only applies in By Truck mode. Whole Truck: completing finalises every shipment on the truck together (each fires its own SAP goods-issue). Per Shipment: the operator completes each shipment separately within the truck task.
fields.label: Completion Mode

fields.description: OFF (default): a fully-loaded plan waits at 'Ready to Complete' — no SAP goods-issue (PGI/GRN) and no T1 loading pushes fire until the operator presses Complete on the handheld (or a supervisor completes it from the console). ON: the plan auto-completes and pushes the moment every coil is loaded.
fields.label: Auto-complete When All Coils Loaded

fields.description: PIN a supervisor enters at the handheld to approve a short-load completion (verified online).
fields.label: Supervisor Approval PIN

fields.description: Direct pickers bin-by-bin using Bin Inventory. Off = flat coil scanning.
fields.label: Enable Bin-Directed Picking

fields.description: Identity = scanned bin QR is the bin code. Regex Extract = capture group 1 is the bin code.
fields.label: Bin QR Decode Rule
Bin QR Decode Regex (group 1 = bin code)

fields.description: Allow scanning a coil whose bin is not the one currently open.
fields.label: Allow Pick Outside Active Bin

fields.description: Mark a coil's Bin Inventory row as Picked when it is loaded.
fields.label: Mark Picked on Load

fields.description: Enable the Inventory Count task on the HHT (bin↔coil mapping capture). Requires the Inventory Recorder role.
fields.label: Enable Inventory Count

fields.description: Default QC state applied to each counted coil (per-coil override on the handheld).
fields.label: Default QC State

fields.description: Post a goods-issue confirmation to SAP when a truck completes loading.
fields.label: Send Goods-Issue Confirmation

fields.description: OAuth2 token endpoint (client-credentials grant).
fields.label: OAuth2 Token URL

fields.description: Optional OAuth2 scope.
fields.label: OAuth2 Scope

fields.description: SAP endpoint that accepts the goods-issue confirmation (POST JSON).
fields.label: Goods-Issue URL

fields.description: Verify the TLS certificate of the SAP endpoint. Turn off only for a trusted self-signed middleware.
fields.label: Verify TLS

fields.description: Auto-send the moment a truck reaches full Completed.
fields.label: Auto-send on Full Completion

fields.description: Hold short-load (partial) confirmations until a supervisor releases them from the console.
fields.label: Hold Short-loads for Review

fields.description: Push a transaction to SAP (zpwmsb) for each coil loaded onto a truck.
fields.label: Push Loading Transactions to SAP

fields.description: SAP zpwmsb REST endpoint (e.g. https://<your-sap-host>/sap/bc/zpwmsb/rest).
fields.label: SAP Loading URL

fields.description: Value sent in the SAP USERNAME field.
fields.label: SAP Username

fields.description: Separator for LOCATION = truck_number <sep> sap_plan_id.
fields.label: Location Separator
